headline: Is Moderna (MRNA) Pricing Make Sense After A 96% One Year Share Price Jump
summary: Investors may be asking whether Moderna's current share price reflects its underlying worth, or if the market is mispricing the stock. After recent volatility, the stock sits at US$49.20, with returns of 59.4% year to date and 95.9% over the last year, alongside weaker 3 and 5 year figures of 68.9% and 65.1% declines. Recent headlines around Moderna have continued to focus on its position in pharmaceuticals and biotech, keeping attention on how its pipeline and partnerships might affect long...
